tasks.instruction: Find a family-friendly Saturday performance happening next month where standard adult tickets cost $40 or less, and select two adult tickets for it.

tasks.instruction: Find an ASL-interpreted performance of a play in May on a Friday evening where ticket prices start at $30 or less, then choose one wheelchair-accessible seat and one adjacent companion seat in the same row, each costing no more than $35, and proceed toward checkout.

tasks.instruction: For the spring musical auditions, reserve any available Wednesday evening slot between March 10 and March 20 that starts between 6:00 PM and 8:00 PM, and complete the sign-up form with the provided personal details.

tasks.instruction: For two adults who expect to attend at least four shows per season, choose a membership plan that includes at least four tickets per member, offers free ticket exchanges, and keeps the combined annual cost under $400, then add it for two people with annual billing to the cart.

tasks.instruction: Using the general contact form, send a message proposing a new play for an upcoming season to the artistic/new work team by selecting the topic related to artistic or new work inquiries and filling in the subject, message text, and contact details as specified.
